chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D - 943 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection Nos. 01, 02 & 18. 2) For hearing of CMA No.5017/2025. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 29.04.2025. Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for Respondents No.2&3. ________________ In continuation of the order passed on 21.04.2025, today Counsel for the Respondents No.2 and 3 files a statement along with Intimation for Withdrawal of Impugned Summons dated 21.04.2025. Same is taken on record, copy has been supplied to the Petitioner’s Counsel. Accordingly, the purpose of filing this petition has been served, hence this petition stands disposed of with pending application(s). ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Nasir/
